metadata.head: dd896f2c
metadata.notes: Long-session protocol: single-agent per scenario, history accumulates across turns, fresh_reset between scenarios.

scenarios.notes: All inline replies. T5 correctly named OS-as-controller, phase isolation, workspace-as-truth, event log as key principles. References prior turns without re-explaining. No empty stop.

T2 reply_len=101 = exact router_empty_response message (functional empty, not content). T3-T5: agent refuses to answer factual questions about event types, disk storage, and JSONL format — should be answerable from project context. Pronoun chain coherence broken at T2.

T1-T2 routed through plan; plan returned empty for both LangGraph and Reyn descriptions. T4 comparison turn correctly says context was lost. T5 (migration question) = router_empty_response. Cross-reference comparison never happened due to empty plan steps.

Primary G12 Pattern E target. Zero empty stops across 5 repetitive re-ask turns. Reply sizes vary (T3=147 for 'most commonly used' question, which agent correctly flagged as unknown). No context-bloat empty-stop observed. G12 fix appears effective here.

scenarios.clean_turns: 5/5 by len (T1,T2,T4,T5 are spawn_ack or summary)
scenarios.notes: T1 and T2 spawn async skills; driver polls next turn before skill completes. T4+T5 (GIL and queue questions) = 69-char spawn_ack only. Rubric requires actual asyncio.Queue code on final turn — only spawn_ack received. Async skill timing mismatch causes rubric failure.

T1: agent incorrectly stated 'there are no ADRs in this project'. ADRs exist at docs/deep-dives/decisions/ (0001..0033+). Entire 5-turn chain cascades from this T1 factual error. ADR lookup tool was not invoked; agent relied on inline knowledge only.

T2 router_empty_response (CAP theorem query returned empty before skill completed). T5 (repair strategies) = spawn_ack only (skill running when driver polled). Content T1-T4 substantive but T5 final turn has no content. Pattern E not observed but async timing gap affects final turn.

summary.g12_pattern_e_observation: S4 (primary target): zero empty stops even under repetitive context growth. G12 fix appears effective for this scenario type.
primary_regression_causes: router_empty_response: S2-T2, S7-T2 (routing layer empty before skill dispatch)
spawn_ack_timing: S5-T4+T5, S7-T5 (async skill not done when driver polls next turn)
factual_error: S6-T1 (agent fabricated 'no ADRs' without tool lookup)
plan_empty_steps: S3-T1+T2 (plan subagent returned empty for both LangGraph+Reyn)
